project_type: Python FastAPI web app for scanning/reviewing rocket flight cards
build_system: pip for Python, pnpm for JS client-side assets. No formal build command. Dockerfile available for containerized builds.
test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio. Tests in /tests/ directory. No conftest.py. Tests use tmp_path fixtures and module-level state reset.
build_command: pip install fastapi uvicorn[standard] sqlalchemy aiosqlite httpx pydantic jinja2 python-multipart Pillow rapidfuzz segno argon2-cffi itsdangerous pytest pytest-asyncio hypothesis httpx
verification_instructions: 1. Install Python dependencies in a venv. 2. Run pytest tests/ -v. 3. Optionally run docker build to validate the image builds.
setup_instructions: pyenv shell 3.13.13 && python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install fastapi uvicorn[standard] 'sqlalchemy[asyncio]' aiosqlite httpx pydantic jinja2 python-multipart Pillow rapidfuzz segno argon2-cffi itsdangerous pytest pytest-asyncio hypothesis httpx
environment_constraints: Python 3.9 system default but 3.13.13 available via pyenv. Docker is available. Node.js 22 and pnpm available. Network mode likely allows common dependencies (pip, npm registries).
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns: module-level configure() for dependency injection, dataclass-based config, async SQLAlchemy with SQLite.
key_patterns: 1. Routers use module-level configure() pattern to receive deps at startup. 2. Database uses module-level singleton engine/session factory. 3. Templates extend base.html which provides nav and title. 4. Config is loaded from JSON via load_config() returning an AppConfig dataclass. 5. auth_database.py is separate from database.py (auth DB is shared, event DB is per-event). 6. Services are instantiated in lifespan() and passed to routers via configure().
directory_structure: Root: config.json, Dockerfile, package.json, tests/. Package: flight_card_scanner/ with main.py (app factory), config.py (dataclass+loader), database.py (SQLAlchemy singleton), routers/ (admin, auth, reports, review, scan), services/ (extraction, record, image, auth, audit, motor_lookup, flier_match), templates/ (Jinja2 HTML), static/ (JS, CSS). Tests in tests/ directory.
